stemHtml: While preparing a Commercial Air Transport flight for cargo only, the Commander discovers that there is a consignment of approved dangerous goods on board. The Commander must ensure that…

options.a: an entry is entered in the aircraft technical log to ensure that there is a record of the consignment.
options.b: written or printed information regarding the dangerous goods, such as a NOTOC, is carried on board.
options.c: a separate loadsheet is prepared since the dangerous goods are regarded as different to normal cargo.
options.d: the local aviation authority has been advised of the dangerous goods in writing prior to departure.
